data.content_ref: inline:{"tour":["0","4","8","5","3","1","7","2","10","6","9","12","11","13"],"rationale":"Mirror of modal structure: 0-4-8-5-3-1-7-2-10 keeps bottom/mid band tight, then diagonal 10-6-9-12-11-13 returns along upper-left to upper-right instead of the usual 9-13 closure; tests whether the return edge is the bottleneck."}
